❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Everything You Need to Know.

How are these resources made? +
Every pack starts as real class-taken notes from lectures, combined with the lecturer's own presentation slides. Think of it as the whole term's work organised into one place — condensed, structured, and easy to revise from — with the added advantage of exam-style questions and answers built in, so you're not just reading, you're testing yourself.
Do you offer refunds? +
Because each pack is a digital file delivered instantly after payment, we're unable to offer refunds once a download link has been unlocked — this is standard for digital products. If your payment went through but you didn't receive access, contact us immediately with your M-Pesa/Paystack transaction code and we'll resolve it.
How do I pay? +
Payments are processed securely through Paystack. Kenyan students can pay directly via M-Pesa — enter your email and phone number, confirm the amount, and approve the STK push on your phone. Access unlocks the moment payment is confirmed.
Do I need to create an account? +
No account needed. We only ask for a valid, verifiable email address and phone number so we can send your receipt and unlock your download — no names required.
Can I preview a resource before buying? +
We don't offer previews. Every pack description lists exactly what topics and units are covered so you know what you're getting — access itself only unlocks after payment is confirmed.
